# TiMOS-B-26.3.R1 both/x86_64 Nokia 7750 SR-1
# Configuration format version 26.3 revision 0
configure {
    service {
        customer "1" {
            customer-id 1
        }
        vprn "red" {
            admin-state enable
            service-id 1
            customer "1"
            interface "red-lo" {
                loopback
                ipv4 {
                    primary {
                        address 172.16.0.1
                        prefix-length 32
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    router "Base" {
        interface "system" {
            ipv4 {
                primary {
                    address 1.1.1.1
                    prefix-length 32
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
